title: Torrezx-Biome Sniffers
description: Now you can enjoy new styles of sniffers
body:
Torrezx-Biome Sniffers

 

ESPAÑOL

Ahora podras disfrutar de nuevos estilos de sniffers,mas coloridos y diversos.

lleva el huevo de sniffer a estos biomas para obtener los nuevos estilo abajo de todo

 

ENGLISH

Now you can enjoy new styles of sniffers, more colorful and diverse.

bring the sniffer egg to these biomes to get the new styles:

Bome list:

- Sniffers cherry: cherry_grove
- Sniffers crimson: crimson forest
- Sniffers warped: warped forest
- Sniffers jungle: jungle-sparse jungle-bamboo jungle
- Sniffers azalea: lush caves
- Sniffer oak: forest
- Sniffer birch: birch forest-old growth birch forest
- Sniffer dark oak: dark forest
- Sniffer Ice: snowy beach-snowy plains-ice spikes-windswept hills-windswept forest-windswept gravelly hills-snowy slopes-frozen peaks-jagged peaks-stony peaks
- Sniffer acacia: savanna-savanna plateau-windswept savanna
- Sniffer spruce:taiga-snowy taiga-old growth pine taiga-old growth spruce taiga grove
- Sniffer swamp: swamp-mangrove swamp
- Sniffer original: plain
